name: skillstack-workflows
description: Nine composable workflow playbooks that orchestrate existing SkillStack plugins for real multi-stage problems: building a pitch in a week, debugging a complex issue, building an AI agent from scratch, making a strategic decision under uncertainty, building a content/CMS/docs platform, turning user research into product insight, rescuing a legacy codebase, optimizing LLM costs without killing quality, and writing your own Claude Code skill. Each workflow is a self-contained playbook with phase-by-phase guidance, gates/loops, and explicit references to the underlying SkillStack skills to install alongside it.
